summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Met Gala Fashion Brand Scout application focusing on NEW features: 25-minute countdown timer, QR code display, BTC address rotation, cancel endpoint, and updated confirmation page. All new features working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend API - BTC address rotation (3 applications assigned different addresses)
Backend API - Cancel application endpoint returns success and marks as expired
Backend API - Cancel endpoint returns 404 for non-existent applications
Backend API - Payment status check with blockchain integration
Frontend - Payment page displays 25-minute countdown timer (data-testid='payment-countdown')
Frontend - Payment page shows QR code element (data-testid='btc-qr-code')
Frontend - Payment page shows 'SESSION EXPIRES IN' text in timer bar
Frontend - Payment page displays BTC address and copy button functionality
Frontend - Payment page shows live activity log with blockchain monitoring
Frontend - Confirmation page shows 'Congratulations' heading with brand name
Frontend - Confirmation page shows 'WHAT HAPPENS NEXT' section with 5-10 business days info
Frontend - Confirmation page shows 'Return to Homepage' button (data-testid='back-to-home')
Frontend - Confirmation page displays applicant email for feedback
Frontend - Footer with support@metbrandscout.co present on all pages
Frontend - Application form validates required fields and shows error messages
Frontend - Application form submits successfully with valid data

success_percentage.frontend: 100% (16/16 features working including all new features)
